symptoms.symptom_name: Grouped pruritic vesicles/papules on extensor elbows and buttocks

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Grouped ('herpetiform') vesicles on extensor surfaces are the classic morphology and site.
Vesicular dermatitis can look similar but is usually tied to a contact exposure and follows the contact pattern.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe intractable pruritus, worse at night, with total sleep loss

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: DH is characteristically intensely itchy, often burning/stinging.
Nocturnal-predominant itch is also classic for scabies — hence the need to exclude it.
Symmetry over extensor surfaces is a hallmark distribution for DH.
Zoster is unilateral and confined to a dermatome; bilateral symmetry excludes it.

symptoms.symptom_name: No interdigital web-space burrows on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absent burrows in the finger/toe web spaces argue against scabies — but this requires an in-person exam and is sealed as a clinician finding.

symptoms.symptom_name: No similar rash in household contacts

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Scabies typically spreads to close contacts; a solitary case in a shared household lowers (but does not eliminate) its likelihood.
Absence of a novel contactant makes allergic contact dermatitis less likely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Excoriation with pinpoint crusts, no purulence and no surrounding cellulitic erythema

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No pus or spreading erythema means no current secondary infection; excoriation is from scratching. Some features are video-suggestible but definitive assessment is a clinician exam.
Normal temperature and vitals argue against systemic infection; these are sealed clinician measurements not obtainable in this telehealth encounter without a home device.

symptoms.symptom_name: Latent gluten sensitivity / coeliac disease association

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: DH is the cutaneous expression of gluten-sensitive enteropathy; the association is near-universal and confirmed on serology/duodenal histology.

symptoms.symptom_name: Perilesional skin biopsy with direct immunofluorescence — granular IgA in dermal papillae

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Granular IgA deposition at the dermal papillae on direct immunofluorescence is the diagnostic gold standard — a hospital/pathology investigation, never available via telehealth.
Positive coeliac serology confirms the underlying enteropathy and supports the DH diagnosis; requires a blood test arranged by the GP.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Symmetrical extensor grouped pruritic vesicles without contact trigger or household spread
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together these point strongly to an autoimmune blistering dermatosis and away from the infectious/contact mimics, though confirmation still needs biopsy/serology.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Coeliac serology (anti-tissue-transglutaminase IgA + total IgA, anti-endomysial antibody) — arranged by GP, while still eating gluten
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Establishes the underlying gluten-sensitive enteropathy; must be taken before starting a gluten-free diet to avoid false negatives.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Perilesional skin biopsy with direct immunofluorescence
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Diagnostic gold standard (granular IgA at dermal papillae); arranged by GP/dermatology, not available via telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Skin scraping / dermoscopy for scabies mites and burrows
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Reasonable in-person step to definitively exclude scabies given the shared-household contagion concern.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: G6PD level (only if dapsone is later being considered by a specialist)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Required before dapsone to avoid haemolysis; the telehealth AI Doctor does not initiate this — it is flagged for the GP/specialist.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Empirical whole-household scabies treatment without confirmation
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Treating the household for scabies on the basis of fear alone, before excluding it on examination, is over-treatment and reinforces the contagion anchor.
